hook: Brand new vs resale landed: the gap is wider than you think

slides.sub: Brand-new launches are holding firm on price. Resale sellers are quietly trimming. Here's where the real deals are printing.

slides.lead: Two-speed market: new launches hold ASP; resale owners are negotiating.
slides.source: URA caveats · POV Guy analysis · Apr 2026

slides.pre: Avg discount to asking, resale inter-terrace
slides.post: Sellers who listed above $4.5M in D19/D28 are conceding the most — approx. 30-day rolling caveats.
slides.source: URA caveats · POV Guy analysis · Apr 2026

slides.title: Three things the discount gap tells us

items.body: ~6.5% average concession on resale terraces is the widest spread since mid-2023 — buyers have leverage again.
New launches (D10 / D11 GCB clusters) are not budging: developer ASP held at $1,800–$2,200 psf land through Q1 2026.
The implication: gap between new and resale is now wide enough to make resale the value play for owner-occupiers.

slides.source: URA caveats · developer price lists · Apr 2026

items.label: District 28
items.sub: Yio Chu Kang / Seletar — semi-D active

slides.label: The real signal
slides.punch: Resale sellers listed at 2024 peaks are finally meeting where buyers have been sitting. New launches haven't moved because developers can afford to wait.
slides.punch_bold: The buyer who moves now in D19/D28 is buying the dip — before developers re-anchor the floor.

slides.pre: Developer ASP, new landed launches D10/D11
slides.post: psf land — developers have not blinked. Resale psf land in same districts: approx. $1,720–$1,890. Gap: ~$200–$300 psf.
slides.source: Developer price lists · URA · POV Guy · Apr 2026

slides.sub: If you know anyone weighing new vs resale landed right now, send them this.

caption:
Brand new vs resale landed — the gap just got interesting. 🏠

• Resale inter-terraces in D19/D28 are closing ~6.5% below ask — widest spread since mid-2023.
• New launches in D10/D11 haven't moved: developer ASP holding at ~$2,050 psf land.
• That ~$200–$300 psf gap makes resale the value play for owner-occupiers right now.

If you're weighing both options, the data says the window on resale pricing won't stay open long.

📅 Book a 30-min strategy call → povguy.sg/strategy-call
